translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Paul, apostle of Jesus Christ byGod's will, according to promise of life, the [life] which [is] in Christ Jesus,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to Timotheus, [my] beloved child: grace, mercy, peace, fromGod [the] Father, and Christ Jesus our Lord.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am thankful toGod, whom I serve from [my] forefathers with pure conscience, how unceasingly I have the remembrance of thee in my supplications night and day,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: earnestly desiring to see thee, remembering thy tears, that I may be filled with joy;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: calling to mind the unfeigned faith which [has been] in thee, which dwelt first in thy grandmother Lois, and in thy mother Eunice, and I am persuaded that in thee also.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For which cause I put thee in mind to rekindle the gift ofGod which is in thee by the putting on of my hands.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: ForGod has not given us a spirit of cowardice, but of power, and of love, and of wise discretion.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Be not therefore ashamed of the testimony of our Lord, nor of me his prisoner; but suffer evil along with the glad tidings, according to the power ofGod;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who has saved us, and has called us with a holy calling, not according to our works, but according to [his] own purpose and grace, which [was] given to us in Christ Jesus before [the] ages of time,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but has been made manifest now by the appearing of our Saviour Jesus Christ, who has annulled death, and brought to light life and incorruptibility by the glad tidings;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to which I have been appointed a herald and apostle and teacher of [the] nations.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For which cause also I suffer these things; but I am not ashamed; for I know whom I have believed, and am persuaded that he is able to keep for that day the deposit I have entrusted to him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Have an outline of sound words, which [words] thou hast heard of me, in faith and love which [are] in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Keep, by the Holy Spirit which dwells in us, the good deposit entrusted.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou knowest this, that all who [are] in Asia, of whom is Phygellus and Hermogenes, have turned away from me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The Lord grant mercy to the house of Onesiphorus, for he has often refreshed me, and has not been ashamed of my chain;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but being in Rome sought me out very diligently, and found [me] —

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the Lord grant to him to find mercy from [the] Lord in that day — and how much service he rendered in Ephesus thou knowest best.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou therefore, my child, be strong in the grace which [is] in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the things thou hast heard of me in the presence of many witnesses, these entrust to faithful men, such as shall be competent to instruct others also.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Take thy share in suffering as a good soldier of Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: No one going as a soldier entangles himself with the affairs of life, that he may please him who has enlisted him as a soldier.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if also any one contend [in the games], he is not crowned unless he contend lawfully.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The husbandman must labour before partaking of the fruits.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Think of what I say, for the Lord will give thee understanding in all things.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Remember Jesus Christ raised from among [the] dead, of [the] seed of David, according to my glad tidings,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in which I suffer even unto bonds as an evil-doer: but the word ofGod is not bound.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For this cause I endure all things for the sake of the elect, that they also may obtain the salvation which [is] in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The word [is] faithful; for if we have died together with [him], we shall also live together;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: if we endure, we shall also reign together; if we deny, he also will deny us;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: if we are unfaithful, he abides faithful, for he cannot deny himself.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of these things put in remembrance, testifying earnestly before the Lord not to have disputes of words, profitable for nothing, to the subversion of the hearers.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Strive diligently to present thyself approved toGod, a workman that has not to be ashamed, cutting in a straight line the word of truth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But profane, vain babblings shun, for they will advance to greater impiety,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their word will spread as a gangrene; of whom is Hymenaeus and Philetus;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [men] who as to the truth have gone astray, saying that the resurrection has taken place already; and overthrow the faith of some.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Yet the firm foundation ofGod stands, having this seal, [The] Lord knows those that are his; and, Let every one who names the name of [the] Lord withdraw from iniquity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But in a great house there are not only gold and silver vessels, but also wooden and earthen; and some to honour, and some to dishonour.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If therefore one shall have purified himself from these, [in separating himself from them], he shall be a vessel to honour, sanctified, serviceable to the Master, prepared for every good work.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But youthful lusts flee, and pursue righteousness, faith, love, peace, with those that call upon the Lord out of a pure heart.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But foolish and senseless questionings avoid, knowing that they beget contentions.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And a bondman of [the] Lord ought not to contend, but be gentle towards all; apt to teach; forbearing;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in meekness setting right those who oppose, ifGod perhaps may sometime give them repentance to acknowledgment of [the] truth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and that they may awake up out of the snare of the devil, [who are] taken by him, for his will.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But this know, that in [the] last days difficult times shall be there;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for men shall be lovers of self, lovers of money, boastful, arrogant, evil speakers, disobedient to parents, ungrateful, profane,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: without natural affection, implacable, slanderers, of unsubdued passions, savage, having no love for what is good,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: traitors, headlong, of vain pretensions, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers ofGod;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having a form of piety but denying the power of it: and from these turn away.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For of these are they who are getting into houses, and leading captive silly women, laden with sins, led by various lusts,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: always learning, and never able to come to [the] knowledge of [the] truth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now in the same manner in which Jannes and Jambres withstood Moses, thus these also withstand the truth; men corrupted in mind, found worthless as regards the faith.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But they shall not advance farther; for their folly shall be completely manifest to all, as that of those also became.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But thou hast been thoroughly acquainted with my teaching, conduct, purpose, faith, longsuffering, love, endurance,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: persecutions, sufferings: what [sufferings] happened to me in Antioch, in Iconium, in Lystra; what persecutions I endured; and the Lord delivered me out of all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And all indeed who desire to live piously in Christ Jesus will be persecuted.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But wicked men and juggling impostors shall advance in evil, leading and being led astray.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But thou, abide in those things which thou hast learned, and [of which] thou hast been fully persuaded, knowing of whom thou hast learned [them];

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and that from a child thou hast known the sacred letters, which are able to make thee wise unto salvation, through faith which [is] in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Every scripture [is] divinely inspired, and profitable for teaching, for conviction, for correction, for instruction in righteousness;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that the man ofGod may be complete, fully fitted to every good work.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I testify beforeGod and Christ Jesus, who is about to judge living and dead, and by his appearing and his kingdom,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: proclaim the word; be urgent in season [and] out of season, convict, rebuke, encourage, with all longsuffering and doctrine.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the time shall be when they will not bear sound teaching; but according to their own lusts will heap up to themselves teachers, having an itching ear;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they will turn away their ear from the truth, and will have turned aside to fables.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But thou, be sober in all things, bear evils, do [the] work of an evangelist, fill up the full measure of thy ministry.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For I am already being poured out, and the time of my release is come.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have combated the good combat, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Henceforth the crown of righteousness is laid up for me, which the Lord, the righteous Judge, will render to me in that day; but not only to me, but also to all who love his appearing.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Use diligence to come to me quickly;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for Demas has forsaken me, having loved the present age, and is gone to Thessalonica; Crescens to Galatia, Titus to Dalmatia.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Luke alone is with me. Take Mark, and bring [him] with thyself, for he is serviceable to me for ministry.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But Tychicus I have sent to Ephesus.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The cloak which I left behind [me] in Troas at Carpus's, bring when thou comest, and the books, especially the parchments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Alexander the smith did many evil things against me. The Lord will render to him according to his works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Against whom be thou also on thy guard, for he has greatly withstood our words.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: At my first defence no man stood with me, but all deserted me. May it not be imputed to them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the Lord stood with [me], and gave me power, that through me the proclamation might be fully made, and all [those of] the nations should hear; and I was delivered out of the lion's mouth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The Lord shall deliver me from every wicked work, and shall preserve [me] for his heavenly kingdom; to whom [be] glory for the ages of ages. Amen.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Salute Prisca and Aquila, and the house of Onesiphorus.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Erastus remained in Corinth, but Trophimus I left behind in Miletus sick.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Use diligence to come before winter. Eubulus salutes thee, and Pudens, and Linus, and Claudia, and the brethren all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The Lord Jesus Christ [be] with your spirit. Grace [be] with you.
